name: Recess Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and 1/2 cup of peanut butter together.
2. Melt another 1/2 cup of peanut butter in a separate pan.
3. Place cupcake liners in muffin tins.
4. Add 1 tablespoon of the melted chocolate and peanut butter mixture to each tin.
5. Let sit for 30 minutes.
6. Add more melted peanut butter on top of each.
7. Let sit for another 30 minutes.
8. Top with another tablespoon of the chocolate and peanut butter mix.
This was from Phil's show recipe from the copycat lady Gloria.
